title: Alert
description: A notification of a service disruption, delay, or advisory affecting one or more routes, stops, or vehicle journeys.

cause.description: Cause of the alert (e.g. TECHNICAL_PROBLEM, STRIKE, ACCIDENT)

effect.description: Effect on service (e.g. DETOUR, REDUCED_SERVICE, NO_SERVICE)

url.description: URL to a page with more information about the alert

headerText.description: Short header text for the alert

activePeriod.description: Time period during which the alert is active

informedEntity.description: Transport entities affected by this alert

validity.description: Time period during which the alert is active
